rationale.R1.3: The output does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure; several core inferences are not warranted by the evidence as presented.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the calibration claim is contradicted by its own number).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
